title: disallow-transitions attribute
manager: An attribute that forbids specified transitions — including externally forced ones — so a machine can declare 'this edge may never be taken from outside' as a checkable contract rather than a convention. It's the MP§3 safety lever that stops a caller from shoving a machine into a state the author deliberately walled off.
cs: folds fsl#953 (disallow external forced transitions); MP§3 family
